## Summary

-

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Runtime installer
- [ ] Agent, skill, command, hook, or template
- [ ] Maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck:openclaw` (required when OpenClaw code or templates are affected)
- [ ] `npx frontend-craft@latest install --all --dry-run --global` or equivalent local dry run, when installer behavior changes
- [ ] Not applicable, documentation-only change

## Documentation and Localization

- [ ] `README.md` is updated when user-facing behavior changes.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated when release-noteworthy behavior changes.
- [ ] Localized README files are synced, or a follow-up translation issue is linked.
- [ ] New or changed public text uses English as the source language.

## Security

- [ ] This change does not introduce new command execution, file writing, network access, or secret handling.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior has been reviewed against `SECURITY.md`.
